user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Apple
Product type: AirPods Pro wireless earbuds
Tone: innovative, premium, minimalist
Visual style: Clean, sleek visuals with a focus on white space and product close-ups that emphasize modernity and sophistication.
Conceptual technique: lifestyle aspiration storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Soundtrack of Silence
brief.caption: A serene park scene with a jogger immersed in their own world, oblivious to the bustling city around them, showcasing the AirPods Pro's noise-cancellation feature.
brief.visual_style: Clean, sleek visuals with a focus on white space and product close-ups that emphasize modernity and sophistication.
brief.typography_style: San Francisco (Apple's proprietary font), sleek and modern with ample kerning
brief.color_scheme: pristine white with subtle hints of silver and space gray
